SessionStart.description: Session start - Priority check and guidance

hooks.command:
.claude/scripts/miyabi-priority-check.sh --verbose || echo '
📋 上記の優先タスクから開始してください'

PostToolUse.description: VOICEVOX narration - gentle explanation after tool execution
Git work log collection - detect commits, pushes, PRs

hooks.command:
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gh pr merge'; then echo '
✅ PRマージ完了。次の優先タスクを確認中...' && sleep 2 && .claude/scripts/miyabi-priority-check.sh --verbose; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gh issue close'; then echo '
✅ Issue完了。次の優先タスクを確認中...' && .claude/scripts/miyabi-priority-check.sh --verbose; fi

PreToolUse.description: Git checkout detection - work start declaration

hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git checkout -b\|git switch -c'; then osascript -e 'display notification "新ブランチ作成中..." with title "Miyabi Git Logger"' 2>/dev/null; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git worktree add'; then .claude/scripts/miyabi-priority-check.sh --enforce || (echo '
❌ 優先タスクが残っています。先に完了してください。' && exit 1); fi

PreToolUse.description: New issue - priority check before creation

hooks.command:
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gh issue create'; then echo '
⚠️ 新規Issue作成前に優先順位を確認...' && .claude/scripts/miyabi-priority-check.sh; fi

PreToolUse.description: Task Tool - priority check before sub-agent launch

hooks.command:
.claude/scripts/miyabi-priority-check.sh --json > /tmp/miyabi-current-priority.json && cat /tmp/miyabi-current-priority.json | jq -r '.action_required' | grep -v 'technical_debt' && echo '
⚠️ 優先タスクがあります。先に対応してください。' || true
